'''lafate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wokely|wokely]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-f-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wokely|wokely]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lafate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:lafate|lafate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lafatesher|lafatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafatesherĂ«m|lafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafatero|lafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lafateshĂ«|lafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafateshĂ«m|lafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafatero|gokilafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilafateshĂ«|gokilafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafateshĂ«m|gokilafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golafankerom|golafankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golafankeshĂ«|golafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golafankeshĂ«m|golafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golafankeya|golafankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafaterom|lafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafatemu|lafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lafateya|lafateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafaterom|gokilafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafatemu|gokilafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilafateya|gokilafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:lafafate|lafafate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lafafatesher|lafafatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafafatesherĂ«m|lafafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafafatero|lafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lafafateshĂ«|lafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafafateshĂ«m|lafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafafatero|gokilafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilafafateshĂ«|gokilafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafafateshĂ«m|gokilafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golafafankerom|golafafankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golafafankeshĂ«|golafafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golafafankeshĂ«m|golafafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golafafankeya|golafafankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafafaterom|lafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafafatemu|lafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lafafateya|lafafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafafaterom|gokilafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafafatemu|gokilafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilafafateya|gokilafafateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:lĂŠfĂŠte|lĂŠfĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lĂŠfĂŠtesher|lĂŠfĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m|lĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠfĂŠtero|lĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|lĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|lĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠfĂŠtero|gokilĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|gokilĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|gokilĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golĂŠfĂŠnkerom|golĂŠfĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«|golĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m|golĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golĂŠfĂŠnkeya|golĂŠfĂŠnkeya]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠfĂŠtemu|lĂŠfĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lĂŠfĂŠteya|lĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠfĂŠterom|gokilĂŠfĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠfĂŠtemu|gokilĂŠfĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilĂŠfĂŠteya|gokilĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:lafafte|lafafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lafaftesher|lafaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafaftesherĂ«m|lafaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafaftero|lafaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lafafteshĂ«|lafafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafafteshĂ«m|lafafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafaftero|gokilafaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilafafteshĂ«|gokilafafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafafteshĂ«m|gokilafafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golafafnkerom|golafafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golafafnkeshĂ«|golafafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golafafnkeshĂ«m|golafafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golafafnkeya|golafafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafafterom|lafafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafaftemu|lafaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lafafteya|lafafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafafterom|gokilafafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafaftemu|gokilafaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilafafteya|gokilafafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
